label: pidgin_benign
text: No vex, I just dey explain wetin happen for class yesterday.

label: pidgin_harassment
text: You no get sense at all, everybody go soon know say you be mumu.

label: code_mixed_exclusion
text: Nobody wan see you for group again, just disappear from here.

label: identity_attack_probe
text: People like you from that tribe should never be allowed here.
